mysql.comment: Create test table and clean it up

mysql.query: INSERT INTO test_users (id, username, role) VALUES (101, 'john_doe', 'ADMIN');

mysql.comment: Read data from table - verify inserted data
mysql.query: SELECT id, username, role FROM test_users WHERE id = 101;
UPDATE test_users SET role = 'SUPER_ADMIN' WHERE id = 101;
SELECT id, username, role FROM test_users WHERE id = 101;

mysql.comment: Read data from table - verify data is deleted
mysql.query: SELECT id, username, role FROM test_users WHERE id = 101;
